chain.thought: Explanation: Identify the years with no sponsors listed in any sponsor columns (shirt, back of shirt, short). The only period with all sponsor fields blank is 1982–1985. Therefore, the last year without sponsorship is 1985.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows that from 1982–1985, the "shirt sponsor" field is blank, indicating no sponsorship. Starting in 1985–1986, a sponsor (Whitbread) appears, and all subsequent periods list a shirt sponsor. Therefore, the last year without sponsorship is 1985.
